message:
feat(cli): add free-space subcommand for ext4 analysis

Add a new CLI subcommand to display ext4 free space information
derived from bitmap analysis.

Usage: ffs free-space <image>

Output includes:
- Total free blocks and inodes from bitmap analysis
- Comparison with group descriptor cached values
- Mismatch warnings for potential inconsistencies

This provides a quick fsck-style consistency check without requiring
kernel-level filesystem mounting.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
